parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 deload-week parity — explicitDeloadAssigned (a deliberate plan-phase signal, not a stale-gap artifact) selects sessionIntent='deload-week' with volumeMode='trim' and weeklyDirection='decrease'. Output differs from reentry/restart (which require a training gap).
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData with recent sessions (no gap -> phase persisted, NOT reentry/restart). decisionMetadata.explicitDeloadAssigned=true is the deliberate deload-week signal threaded into the Clean Input Contract.
